name: multi_turn_with_judge
description: Demonstrates multi-turn (turns length > 1) and llm_scorer_instruction. Turn 1 establishes a fact; Turn 2 must build on it. The per-scenario LLM judge instruction tells the judge to penalise Turn 2 if it ignores Turn 1.
llm_scorer_instruction: Turn 2 MUST reference the value Turn 1 established. If Turn 2 invents a new number, asks the user to repeat it, or contradicts Turn 1, score response_quality as 'low'.

turns.message: I'm picking a lucky number for a demo. The number is 47. Acknowledge with a single short sentence that mentions the number 47.
What was the lucky number I told you in my previous message? Reply with only that number on its own line, nothing else.
